name: checked
description: Boolean state. Use `bind:checked` for two-way control.

name: indeterminate
description: Centre the knob and lock interaction.

name: loading
description: Spinner overlay (collapses the track to a circle).

name: ghostKnob
description: Icon-knob mode — drops the white pill so the inline icon snippet IS the knob.

name: color
description: Track + bg accent (only the swooping bg circle is tinted; knob always stays white).

name: knob
description: Knob content (rendered inside the circle — small icon).

name: iconOn
description: On-state inline label/icon (rendered in the track when checked).

name: iconOff
description: Off-state inline label/icon (rendered in the track when unchecked).
